_comment: Maps merged-pickle column instrument-title prefixes to logical netCDF observation families for the ACTIVATE campaign. Family assignment is by longest-prefix match of a column name against the keys of title_to_family, so this file alone is sufficient (the meta pickle is only used for group-level provenance attrs). Titles not listed here fall into the 'other' family.

family_long_name.optical: In-situ aerosol optical measurements (TSI-3563 nephelometer, PSAP)
family_long_name.aerosol_size_dist: In-situ dry aerosol size distributions (SMPS, TSI-3340 LAS)
family_long_name.ccn: Cloud condensation nuclei concentrations (DMT CCN counter)
family_long_name.cloud_probes: Cloud and aerosol size distributions (DMT CDP, DMT CAS, SPEC FCDP)
family_long_name.trace_gas: Trace-gas and water-vapor measurements (CO2, CH4, CO, O3, DLH H2O)
